# SBA Bankruptcy - Small Business Loan Relief [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> SBA loan bankruptcy options for small business owners. Chapter 7, Chapter 11 Subchapter V, and personal guarantee discharge. 2026 guide.

## About
sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Credit Rebuilding After SBA Bankruptcy - Starting Over: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/credit-rebuilding-sba.html
- EIDL and SBA Loan Crossover - Multiple SBA Loans in Bankruptcy: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/eidl-crossover.html
- SBA Bankruptcy - Small Business Loan Relief: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/
- Discharging SBA Personal Guarantees - Eliminating Liability: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/personal-guarantee-discharge.html
- SBA 504 Loans in Bankruptcy - Real Estate and Equipment: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/sba-504-loans.html
- SBA 7(a) Loans in Bankruptcy - Discharge and Options: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/sba-7a-loans.html
- Alternatives to Bankruptcy - For SBA Borrowers: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/sba-alternatives.html
- SBA Collections Timeline - What to Expect After Default: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/sba-collections-timeline.html
- SBA Microloan Default - Options and Bankruptcy: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/sba-microloan-default.html
- Subchapter V for SBA Borrowers - Small Business Reorganization: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/subchapter-v-sba.html
- Privacy Policy: https://sbaborrowerbankruptcy.com/privacy.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
